Home

Verdantly

A place to engage in sustainable travel

Get Away

Travel

My dream trips. Some places I have visited and others I have yet to go. Itineraries to inspire thoughtful, genuine, and extremely memorable adventures around the world.

Sustainability

Articles surrounding sustainability in the hospitality industry. Resources to educate the everyday explorer on ecotourism, local culture and environmental impacts of traveling.

With Verdantly, I strive to combine my thirst to visit and interact with every corner of the world while also being conscious of my actions and impact.

About Me

Bonnie is an avid traveler with years of experience working in the hospitality industry.
